description_long: This object is a stylized, upright flower with a tall, green stem and a vertical spike of purple, bell-shaped blossoms arranged in a dense cluster. The blossoms are geometric and angular, each appearing as a polygonal tube or bell, stacked closely along the upper portion of the stem. The green stem is straight and supports a few broad, angular leaves at its base, which are arranged in a whorled pattern. The flower spike is elongated, with the blossoms becoming smaller and more spaced out toward the top. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a foxglove or similar spiked inflorescence, with a strong contrast between the vivid purple flowers and the deep green foliage. The object has a low-poly, faceted aesthetic, giving it a modern, abstract look suitable for urban landscaping or decorative use.
description: A tall, stylized flower with a green stem, broad angular leaves, and a dense vertical spike of purple, bell-shaped blossoms. The geometric, faceted design gives it a modern, abstract appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dense cluster of purple blossoms and two prominent green leaves extending outward at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical alignment of the blossoms and the whorled arrangement of the green leaves at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the purple blossoms and green leaves visible but with slight variation in leaf orientation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the symmetry of the flower spike and the angular, whorled leaves at the base.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, vertical spike (raceme) with each flower having a tubular, bell-shaped form. The arrangement is whorled along the central axis, with overlapping and layering present, and a general bilateral symmetry to each blossom.
